title: Easy Creafting
description:
Simple and convenient synthesis methods are what we need, and I com true.
简单方便的合成方式是我们所需要的，而我，将它做了出来
body:
對Minecraft JAVA版增加新的合成配方，一切需要在合成臺中進行合成
例：還原舊版附魔金蘋果的合成配方，三個銅錠可以合成為鐵錠，等各種合成配方的修改。
此數据包/模組以服務端為主，用戶端為輔，若服務端並未安裝，用戶端將無法使用。
To add new crafting recipes to Minecraft JAVA Edition, all the necessary recipes need to be added in the crafting table.
For example: To restore the old enchanted golden apple crafting recipe, three copper ingots can be combined to form an iron ingot, and other various crafting recipe modifications.
This datapack/mods is mainly server-side, with client-side as a supplementary resource. If the server side is not installed, the client will not be able to use it.


明明有足夠的方塊卻仍需換算，不如直接省去這個步驟直達目標！(合成結果數量一致)
There's enough bolck to make the calculation unnecessary, so why not skip this step and directly reach the target?(with the same number of synthesis results)

使用可堆疊的材料直接合成，無需慢慢換算。
Using stackable materials for direct synthesis, no need to slowly calculate anymore.

不同種類的木頭也能一起合成。（無需按照配圖中的方式）
Different types of wood can also be used for direct synthesis.（No need to refer to the accompanying gallery）
